code: import React from"react";import{useCurrency}from"../theme/useCurrency";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ExpenseList=_ref=>{let{expenses,onDeleteExpense}=_ref;const{currency}=useCurrency();if(expenses.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No expenses added yet."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"expense-list",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Expense List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:expenses.map(exp=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:exp.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[currency," ",exp.amount]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>onDeleteExpense(exp.id),children:"Delete"})]},exp.id))})]});};export default ExpenseList;
